senses.definition_en: swarm e.g. of bees or wasps
senses.definition_dg: Kundi kulu ra wadudu anaotsapa phamwenga, kama nyuchi.

examples.dg: Bumba ra nyuchi rikatuluka muhini.
examples.en: A swarm of bees came out of the tree.
examples.sw: Kundi la nyuki lilitoka mtini.

equivalents_sw: aina ya ngoma ya pili kwa ukubwa

senses.definition_sw: aina ya ngoma ya pili kwa ukubwa
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya ngoma ya phiri kpwa ukpwulu, inahumirwa kpwa ngoma za chila.

examples.dg: Bumbumbu ikabigwa kpwa sherehe ya arusi.
examples.en: The second-largest drum was played at the wedding celebration.
examples.sw: Ngoma ya pili kwa ukubwa ilipigwa kwenye sherehe ya harusi.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga ngoma kpwa mikpwono.

examples.dg: Barobaro nkubumbunda ngoma usiku kucha.
examples.en: The young men are beating the drum all night.
examples.sw: Vijana wanapiga ngoma usiku kucha.

senses.definition_en: to crush (e.g. lumps of soil), to pulverise, to break up
senses.definition_dg: Kusaga chitu hadi chiwe unga ama vipande-vipande vidide.

examples.dg: Náhumira dziwe kubumbundisa mtsanga huno
examples.en: I used a rock to break up this soil
examples.sw: Nilitumia jiwe kusaga mchanga huu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuchanganyikiwa na kushangala kpwa kukala hukuelewa chinachoenderera.

examples.dg: Habari hiyo ikahendza atu akale na bumbuwazi.
examples.en: That news caused people to be confused.
examples.sw: Habari hiyo ilisababisha watu kuwa na bumbuazi.

senses.definition_en: to disperse (e.g. people leaving a meeting)
senses.definition_dg: Atu kutsamukana kula phatu pamwenga, kuphiya kpwa njira tofauti.

examples.dg: Mkpwutano uriphoisha atu akabumukana.
examples.en: When the meeting ended, people dispersed.
examples.sw: Mkutano ulipoisha watu walifumukana.

equivalents_en: spread out something which is folded

senses.definition_en: to spread out something which is folded
senses.definition_dg: Kugolosa chitu chirichokundzwa, kuphanua.

examples.dg: Nkabumula nguwo
examples.en: I have spread out the clothes
examples.sw: Alifumua nguo na kuianika juani.

senses.definition_en: to let people go, to dismiss
senses.definition_dg: Kuricha atu aphiye, kuatsamusa.

examples.dg: Náabumula azee bada ya kuapha pesa
examples.en: I let the old men go after giving them money
examples.sw: Niliwafumua wazee baada ya kuwapa pesa.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra vitu virivyofungbwa phamwenga.

examples.dg: Hala bunda ra kuni hiro na uhiike dzikoni.
examples.en: Take that bundle of firewood and put it in the kitchen.
examples.sw: Chukua bunda la kuni hilo na uliweke jikoni.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga chitu kpwa kinu na mchi hadi chiwe unga.

examples.dg: Mayo nkubunda mphunga kinuni.
examples.en: Mother is pounding rice in the mortar.
examples.sw: Mama anatwanga mchele kinuni.

senses.definition_en: to pound (e.g. using pestle and mortar)
senses.definition_dg: Kutwanga chitu kpwa kinu na mchi.

examples.dg: Achetu anabunduga muhogo kinuni.
examples.en: The women are pounding cassava in the mortar.
examples.sw: Wanawake wanatwanga muhogo kinuni.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya buwa-buwa.

examples.dg: Ana bundugo ya kubuwa-buwa mundani.
examples.en: She has a gleaning stick for the farm.
examples.sw: Ana chombo cha kubugabugia shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Nguvu za bandia ambazo mutu anaaphiwa ni mganga kpwa njira ya utsai.

examples.dg: Mutu iye anaaminiwa ana bundugo.
examples.en: That person is believed to have supernatural strength.
examples.sw: Mtu yule anaaminiwa ana nguvu za kichawi.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu mdide anayehenda asali na anaweza kuuma.

examples.dg: Mabung'o gakainjira muhini kpwa kudzenga nyumba yao.
examples.en: The bees entered the tree to build their hive.
examples.sw: Nyuki waliingia mtini kujenga nyumba yao.

equivalents_en: horizontal pole used for making roof struts

senses.definition_en: horizontal pole used for making roof struts
senses.definition_dg: Muhi unaolazwa usawa kpwa kuhendza mapaa ga nyumba ya chila.

examples.dg: Bunga zinahumirwa kpwa kudzenga dari ya nyumba.
examples.en: Horizontal poles are used for building the roof of a house.
examples.sw: Miti ya mlalo inatumika kujenga dari ya nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapha avyatswa wa tsi anakutana kpwa kuhenda sheria.

examples.dg: Bunge ya Kenya iko Nairobi.
examples.en: The Parliament of Kenya is in Nairobi.
examples.sw: Bunge la Kenya liko Nairobi.

equivalents_en: shaft of an arrow (i.e. an arrow without its head)

senses.definition_en: shaft of an arrow (i.e. an arrow without its head)
senses.definition_dg: Muhi wa muvwi ambao kukaondolewa nchaye.

examples.dg: Bura taiwezi kuumiza sana dza muvwi wenye ncha.
examples.en: A shaft without a head cannot injure as much as a complete arrow.
examples.sw: Mshale bila ncha hauwezi kuumiza sana kama mshale wenye ncha.

senses.definition_en: paddy field, field in which rice is planted
senses.definition_dg: Munda wa kurimira mphunga, ambao una madzi manji.

examples.dg: Bura ya mphunga inalondzwa madzi manji.
examples.en: The rice paddy field needs a lot of water.
examples.sw: Shamba la mpunga linahitaji maji mengi.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo chenye mpiri na chiguzo chire cha kuphagira ama kuosha.

examples.dg: Humira burashi kpwa kupiga nyumba.
examples.en: Use the brush for sweeping the house.
examples.sw: Tumia burashi kwa kupiga nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Bila mana, bila fwaida yoyosi.

examples.dg: Usihumire wakatiwo bure, henda kazi.
examples.en: Don't waste your time, do some work.
examples.sw: Usitumie wakati wako bure, fanya kazi.

senses.definition_dg: Bila kuriphira chochosi, bila bei.

examples.dg: Hwaaphiwa chakurya bure kpwa sherehe.
examples.en: We were given food free of charge at the celebration.
examples.sw: Tulipewa chakula bure kwenye sherehe.

equivalents_en: an instrument made from a buoy in which two holes have been cut
equivalents_sw: a pipe of variable length is inserted into one of the holes and blown whilst being extended and compressed to produce a hollow sound of varying pitch

senses.definition_en: an instrument made from a buoy in which two holes have been cut
senses.definition_sw: a pipe of variable length is inserted into one of the holes and blown whilst being extended and compressed to produce a hollow sound of varying pitch
senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kupigira chilichohendwa na chitu cha kutengeneza sauti ya kutisha.

examples.dg: Buru ikabigwa kpwa sherehe ya arusi.
examples.en: The horn was blown at the wedding celebration.
examples.sw: Chombo cha kupiga kilipigwa kwenye sherehe ya harusi.

senses.definition_dg: Kupalilia mimea mundani ama kurima udongo.

examples.dg: Akurima anaburuga munda wao kpwa jembe.
examples.en: The farmers are weeding their field with a hoe.
examples.sw: Wakulima wanapalilia shamba lao kwa jembe.

senses.definition_dg: Kupalilia mimea mundani.

examples.dg: Mchetu nkuburugira munda wa muhogo.
examples.en: The woman is weeding the cassava field.
examples.sw: Mwanamke anapalilia shamba la muhogo.

senses.definition_en: to stir up, to mix (e.g. food), to muddy a pool (e.g. by cattle)
senses.definition_dg: Kukoroga chitu, kuchanganya chakurya ama madzi na udongo.

examples.dg: Burunga ugali huno vizuri usije ukaganda.
examples.en: Stir this ugali well so it doesn't get lumpy.
examples.sw: Koroga ugali huu vizuri usije ukaganda.

senses.definition_dg: Kuvuta chitu photsi kpwa kukichikiza, kukokota.

examples.dg: Ana akaburuta muhi hura kula tsakani.
examples.en: The children dragged that log from the forest.
examples.sw: Watoto waliburuta mti ule kutoka msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phenye mimea na maua ambapo phahifadhiwa kpwa uzuri.

examples.dg: Busitani ya nyumba yehu ina maua manono sana.
examples.en: Our house garden has very beautiful flowers.
examples.sw: Bustani ya nyumba yetu ina maua mazuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariye jela, ambaye akafungbwa kpwa kosa arilohenda.

examples.dg: Busu wa jela nkuhenda kazi ngumu chila siku.
examples.en: The prisoner does hard work every day.
examples.sw: Mfungwa wa jela anafanya kazi ngumu kila siku.

senses.definition_dg: Kukanda madomo dzulu ya ngozi ya mutu wanjina kpwa upendo.

examples.dg: Mayo wamubusure mwanawe chitswani.
examples.en: Mother kissed her child on the head.
examples.sw: Mama alimbusu mtoto wake kichwani.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra vitu virivyofungbwa phamwenga kpwa kuphirika.

examples.dg: Hala butsa ra nguwo uriphe baba.
examples.en: Take the bundle of clothes and give it to father.
examples.sw: Chukua furushi la nguo na umpe baba.

equivalents_en: dull or blunt knife or machete

examples.dg: Chisu hichi ni butu, kinahitaji kunolwa.
examples.en: This knife is dull, it needs to be sharpened.
examples.sw: Kisu hiki ni butu, kinahitaji kunolewa.

equivalents_en: stalk remaining after maize has been harvested

senses.definition_en: stalk remaining after maize has been harvested
senses.definition_dg: Muhi wa muhindi unaosala bada ya kuvuna, bua.

examples.dg: Buwa za muhindi zinahumirwa kpwa kuasira moho.
examples.en: Maize stalks are used for lighting fires.
examples.sw: Mabua ya mahindi yanatumika kwa kuwashia moto.

senses.definition_en: to glean, to look for left-over fruits after harvest
senses.definition_dg: Kuendza masazo ga mimea ambayo ikasala mundani bada ya kuvuna.

examples.dg: Achetu anaphiya mundani kubuwa-buwa bada ya mavuno.
examples.en: The women go to the field to glean after harvest.
examples.sw: Wanawake wanakwenda shambani kubugabuga baada ya mavuno.

examples.dg: Nguo hino ni bwadzika, iphiye kuoshwa.
examples.en: This cloth is dirty, it should be washed.
examples.sw: Nguo hii ni chafu, iende kuoshwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu dzulu ya chitu chanjina kpwa kuchitundika.

examples.dg: Bwadzika nguo hizo kpwa kamba.
examples.en: Hang those clothes on the line.
examples.sw: Tundika nguo hizo kwenye kamba.

senses.definition_en: to throw away, to drop, to throw
senses.definition_dg: Kuricha chitu chianguke photsi, ama kutsupha chitu.

examples.en: Don't drop that cup, it will break.
examples.sw: Usiangushe kikombe hicho, kitavunjika.

senses.definition_dg: Kuku kutaga mayai.

examples.dg: Kuku yehu anabwaga mayai mairi chila siku.
examples.en: Our chicken lays two eggs every day.
examples.sw: Kuku wetu anataga mayai mawili kila siku.

senses.definition_dg: Kutseka chitu kpwa shoka ama panga kuwa vipande-vipande.

examples.dg: Bwaga kuni hizo ndipho dziike dzikoni.
examples.en: Chop that firewood so I can put it in the kitchen.
examples.sw: Kata kuni hizo ndipo niziweke jikoni.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika vitu hadi phatu phadzale.

examples.dg: Bwaga madzi ndani ya birika.
examples.en: Fill up the tank with water.
examples.sw: Jaza maji ndani ya tanki.

senses.definition_en: to struggle, to contend, to fight
senses.definition_dg: Kupigana na mutu wanjina, kushindana kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Ana airi akabwagana muhala wa rero.
examples.en: Two children fought this afternoon.
examples.sw: Watoto wawili walipigana mchana wa leo.

examples.en: Don't sit with your legs wide apart, it's not proper.
examples.sw: Usikae miguu wazi, si vizuri.

examples.dg: Bwana mkpwulu wa kijiji nkuheshimika sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu wa chilume anayeolewa, bwana arusi.

examples.en: This house is spacious, it has many rooms.
examples.sw: Nyumba hii ni kubwa na wazi, ina vyumba vingi.

senses.definition_dg: Chikapu chikulu sana cha kuikira vitu.

examples.dg: Ika mihogo yosi ndani ya bweko.
examples.en: Put all the cassava inside the large basket.
examples.sw: Weka mihogo yote ndani ya kikapu kikubwa.

examples.dg: Proverb: Bweni tarivoywa moho
examples.en: Fire is not requested at a bachelor’s house (where no cooking takes place)
examples.sw: Nyumba ya bweni haizimwi moto.

senses.definition_dg: Makodza ga viazi vitamu ambago ganarwa kama mboga.

examples.en: Sweet potato leaves are good vegetables for making stew.
examples.sw: Majani ya viazi vitamu ni mboga nzuri ya kupikia mchuzi.

senses.definition_en: to remain unsold, to remain on the shelf

examples.dg: Samaki ache akabwereza kpwa mana bei yache ni kulu.
examples.en: Her fish remained unsold because the price was too high.
examples.sw: Samaki wake walibaki kwa sababu bei yake ni kubwa.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye kaweza kugomba, bubu.

examples.dg: Bwibwi nkuhumira mikpwono kugomba na atu.
examples.en: The mute person uses hands to communicate with people.
examples.sw: Bubu anatumia mikono kuongea na watu.

examples.dg: Mkpwongo akabwinika kitandani kpwa siku nyinji.
examples.en: The sick person was bedridden for many days.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa alilala kitandani kwa siku nyingi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu dzulu ya chitu chanjina ili chisionekane ama kisiphahiwe ni joto.

examples.dg: Ingu ra kubwiningiza
examples.en: Clouds which cover the whole sky
examples.sw: Finika mtoto blanketi kwa sababu kuna baridi.

examples.dg: Anasikira umande, kpwa hivyo akadzibwiningiza nguwo kubu-kubu
examples.en: He is feeling cold, so he has covered himself from head to toe
examples.sw: Finika mtoto blanketi kwa sababu kuna baridi.
